The assistant didn't do any verification. So we can mark 3.2 as yes.

3.3 No or Incorrect Verification: This is similar to weak verification. They didn't verify. So yes.

The definitions: 3.2 Weak Verification: verification mechanisms exist but are incomplete. 3.3 No or Incorrect Verification: omission of proper checking. They didn't have verification. So 3.3 yes. 3.2 maybe no because no verification mechanism existed. But the assistant didn't have a verification step. So 3.2 no. 3.3 yes.
